title: Just Blahaj
description: This mod adds the iconic IKEA Blahaj (Blåhaj) plushie and some variants!
body:
# 
# This mod adds the iconic IKEA **Blahaj (Blåhaj)** plushie and some variants!

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab9b203ca48472fff132053e657b4c1957a7f97c_0.webp)

Has built in **Create & AE2** compatibility!

![Stonecutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/772674fa4b9807554eb277b760c8466bceabd121.png)

**Inspired by:** (https://modrinth.com/mod/blahaj)
**_(Originated as a port of this, turned into it's own project with new models, textures, ect.)_**

[Join Our Discord!](https://discord.gg/75x6tzuGR6)
